brief_summary: Three-box horizontal lineage diagram showing Work Louder (boutique macro-pad vendor) building the Creator Micro 2 (existing $199 catalog macro pad), which becomes the base platform for Codex Micro (OpenAI's first branded hardware, shipping July 15, 2026). The third box is accented in coral to mark it as the new, OpenAI-branded product.
data_sources: apps/web/src/content/articles/work-louder-openai-codex-micro.mdx:What's shipping — 'Codex Micro is built on top of Work Louder's existing Creator Micro 2, a $199 macro pad the vendor already sells under its own name'
